Event: Summer Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: RI189
Absorbed Eruption Ring

Once in a while launches a fireball at a random enemy unit. The fireball bounces up to 3 times. It deals 150400 magic damage on impact and sets the target on fire. The burning target takes 204800 magic damage, and their healing rate is reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Summer Festival 2025

Event date: 01/06/2025

Sage bot code: RI189

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
